solution.css:
.row { display: flex; }
.row div { flex: 1; padding: 20px; background: #4ecdc4; border: 1px solid #333; }

title: Content-Aware vs Equal Columns
description: Create two rows side-by-side. Row 1 uses `flex: auto` (content-aware), Row 2 uses `flex: 1` (equal). Compare the difference.
hint: Row 1: `flex: auto`; Row 2: `flex: 1`. Same items in both.

solution.css:
.row1 { display: flex; } .row1 div { flex: auto; padding: 15px; background: #ff6b6b; }
.row2 { display: flex; } .row2 div { flex: 1; padding: 15px; background: #4ecdc4; }
